versions.note: Fresh PREAM start — incorporates learnings from linear_equations v1.13.0 (WORKFLOW, BANNED patterns, MAGNITUDE/GROUNDING rules, POST-COMPLETION VERIFICATION, CLEAN NUMBER DESIGN)
PREAM iter1: +SINGLE-POINT-OF-FAILURE rule, +ANGLE VARIETY (3+ per batch), +DISTRACTOR PLAUSIBILITY FLOOR, strengthened D3 (must compute) and D5 (must go beyond 2 formulas)

PREAM iter2: +COMPUTATIONAL DISTRACTOR RULE (whitelist valid types, ban averaging/stem-restating), +provide ALL THREE trig values, +mirror-image question ban, +ban tan(45)=1 in D4, +explicit D5 ban on 45-45-90+area. PREAM iter3 tested this version — converged (0.6% < 2% threshold). Best version remains 1.4.0 (test avg 5.41).

Manual iteration targeting LLM attention patterns: (1) BATCH PLANNING section upfront forces angle/structure planning before generation, (2) DIFFICULTY LITMUS TESTS with YES/NO examples moved to section 13 near end for recency bias, (3) Expanded D5 BANNED list (perimeter+special, altitude-to-hyp, single-triangle-algebra), (4) POST-COMPLETION adds difficulty/diversity/realism checks alongside arithmetic, (5) SCENARIO REALISM with specific angle constraints per context type
